other_observers: David Leatherman; Dave heard the bird calling and together we tracked it down.
description: Calling woodpecker with gray upper forehead and crown. Sides of head and neck grayish-white. Black medium length pointed bill. Back of neck red. Back barred black and white. Uppertail-coverts white. Slight orange color to chin and just above bill. Low center of belly with slight reddish patch. Rest of underparts grayish white. Legs grayish.Behaviors: This bird was actively foraging and flying between mature trees in the campground. Calling frequently.Call: Heard. As described in National Geo.Plumage: adult
